reviews.title: Disappointing at best, insulting at worst.
reviews.text: It is a difficult thing when you have to give a negative review to a place that has a worldwide impeccable reputation. I’ve stayed at the Banyan Tree in the Maldives, Bangkok, and Koh Samui, so when I saw one in Lang Co, I wanted to get away from the cacophony of Danang, where I am staying for a month. Sadly, besides the terrific host, Tuan, who was perfect during my entire stay, everything about the Banyan Tree Lang Co was a letdown. First of all, the Saffron Thai restaurant was a pure disappointment on every imaginable level. I am retired and live in Bangkok two months a year, and I can assure you that this restaurant is not better than a nice hearty meal at a night market anywhere in Thailand: most iconic Thai dishes are not on the menu (steamed whole fish in lime juice, Pad Kra Pao, duck curry, etc). The menu is extremely basic and boring, and even insulting to Thai culture, and I can only guess that they are lazy to source real authentic food, such as whole fresh fish or put some effort into more creative curries. Besides the disappointing quality of the food, I had made reservations about two months in advance, asking for a nice table with a view: upon arrival, I was stunned that they gave me a sad little table at the entrance of the restaurant, which was quite insulting. Yes, why not place the person who writes you two months in advance to deal with incoming traffic even though half the restaurant will be empty? Besides this first disappointing restaurant, I tried the other two eateries, the Italian bistro and the alleged Vietnamese restaurant. The Italian lunch was fine (nothing to write home about or allow rental space in your brain for more than those few hours), as I didn’t want to risk it and ordered a burger & beer, with a burrata salad, which was “fine.” I had dinner one night at the Vietnamese place, and the meal, yet again, was an insult to the Vietnamese people: I ordered the pho; I didn’t want to take more risks, so why not stick with something basic like pho? Sadly, it came out lukewarm with stubborn pieces of meat that was not edible. Do not get me started on reviewing the breakfast. Extremely high carbs, any protein they had were simply garnishes to the other high carb dishes (noodles, Hue dumplings, etc); the few meat entrees at breakfast consisted of dry (old?) meat that was simply very low quality. If all of this isn’t enough to dissuade you from coming here, staff members on the grounds were generally rude and dismissive when I asked for directions; the gym is quite an insult (meaning, there you cannot do a workout, period) to a high end hotel that traps you in a location where you have nothing to do: yes, nothing to do because the water in the pool is very warm, the hotel has not invested in a water cooling system to keep the water cool: and are you sure you want to take their hiking trips in the oppressive purgatory heat? Finally, I must recognize that many people complain about the highway robbery of the prices of food in the reviews. Yes, be prepared to pay $30 for pho and $5 for a 12oz bottle of water because they do not have complementary table water. But I feel the prices are fair, honestly, as this is a high end hotel. But tragically, and significantly, the quality of the food does NOT commensurate with the prices, so you will be stunned at the paradox. Overall, I cannot imagine how this place can thrive for so many years. Perhaps only people who make mistakes once in their lives will come here, and I suppose there are enough people in this world to make mistakes so that this place can. That’s all.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Hung,

Thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback regarding your recent stay with us here.

We are truly sorry to learn that your experience at Banyan Tree Lang Co did not meet your expectations, especially given your previous positive experiences with Banyan Tree properties. Please accept our sincere apologies for the disappointments you encountered during your stay.

Your comments have been taken very seriously and shared with the respective teams for immediate review and improvement. We genuinely value your candid feedback, as it helps us better understand where we have fallen short and where we must improve.

Our team will also reach out to you personally via email to express our sincere apologies and discuss your experience further.

Thank you once again for your feedback, and we truly regret that we were unable to provide the experience you had hoped for.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.negatives:
The main con for me was actually the spa. We were so excited for our spa day and spent a lot of money to get pampered with a massage and scrub. The scrub was fun and different for us. I’ve never had a Balinese massage but the brochure had said medium to strong, I asked my lady twice for stronger pressure and nothing changed. It also felt like she was going through the motions vs focusing on areas I had highlighted. I was really disappointed to spend that much for our massages and not feel relaxed or knots worked out. 

It’s a bit far from other locales and destinations you might want to see which can be a pro unless you’re using it as a launching base.

reviews.title: A huge disappointment for a famous brand name
reviews.text:
We stayed at Banyan Tree resorts in Asia before so we had high expectation for this resort.  Turned out it was nothing like Banyan Tree quality, not even for a 5 star hotel resort.  
Pros:  The room was clean and the bed was comfortable. The room set up is like a small regular 5 star hotel.
Cons: so many of them. The landscaping was like an abandoned resort with all the weed and plants grew freely blocking the path to the sea.  The pool was dirty and no one came to clean during our 3 nights. The hotel key lock was so hard to use. The high tea was a joke of a piece of tiny jelly and a piece of Bánh Lọc along with cheap local tea.
The staff seemed like they hate doing their job.   Breakfast was very limited of choice.  Because the resort had cheap promotion for the locals, it was crowed and messy just like a 3 star hotel where people fighting to grab food. The beach sand is very rough and full of dead shell. We could name more but  has no more space. It is a rip off. Never come back.
reviews.response:
Dear Thuy,
First of all we would like to thank you for choosing us. However, clearly we failed to live up to your expectations. We would like to extend our sincere apology for any inconvenience you encountered during your stay. We regret that we could have done something for you and your family if all these issues were communicated to us during your stay. Definitely we will take your feedback for further improvement. 
Regarding your comment about our associates, it was certainly not our intention to make you feel we were not enjoying our jobs and I would like to assure you that most of us have our hearts in the right place and do take pride in providing our guests with memorable experiences and always try our best to make this happen. 
We are thankful that you brought these concerns to our attention, these gives us an opportunity to re-look at our high maintained standards, to ensure consistency and great service to all guests. 
Best regards, 
Figen Bulut
Hotel Manager

reviews.title: Banyan never again
reviews.text: It was my first and last time at a Banyan Tree hotel.  Despite it’s location and always willing staff, this hotel is just not up to the standard I expected. The GM was nowhere to be found. In fact, one could feel his/her absence in a plethora of details: a broken lamp silicone glued, a typo in the welcoming message, a digitally imposed signature upon the welcoming message by an ASIA manager, stickers over information on in-room info, a broken telephone cord, a bat inside the room upon arrival... The restaurant options were sub par and very limited and the prices were outrageous for the quality provided.  I was charged 10.000.000 dongs (454 euros) for  airport transfer and 4hours of car. Worst of all, they call you many times to triple check info that you will feel like an old fashioned cable girl instead of a guest... Pick another hotel. I wish I had.
reviews.response:
Dear Sofia, 

Thank you so much for choosing Banyan Tree Lang Co. I hope that my earlier email has reached you well following your stay with us. I have read in depth each of your comments in regards to your valuable feedback. Once again, my apologies since our team was only partially to recover from concerns raised, this does disappoint me as it is not our usual standard.

We hope and trust that this unfortunate experience will not completely tarnish your opinion of Banyan Tree and that we will have the opportunity to welcome you back to our Banyan Tree Lang Co on a future occasion for a more pleasurable experience.

Best regards,

Brett Burton
Area General Manager

reviews.title: Super good experience
reviews.text: The photos online are just as beautiful as seeing them in person, incredibly beautiful. The privacy is very high, and there aren't too many people. The beach and the pool are both beautiful, and the staff are very friendly with great service. The rooms are also very nice, and I sleep well every day. I love the pillows and sheets that I can choose for myself, and the mattress is very comfortable. Riding a bike in the resort is also a very enjoyable experience. The breakfast at Watercourt is amazing, with a wide variety of choices, and the fruits are delicious and fresh. You can also mix and juice them yourself, which is very healthy.
reviews.response:
Dear Li,

Thank you for sharing such a wonderful review of your recent stay with us. We are truly delighted to know that the beauty of the resort exceeded your expectations and that you enjoyed the sense of privacy, tranquility, and our beach and pool surroundings. It is especially rewarding to hear that you had restful nights and appreciated the comfort of your room, from the pillows and linens to the mattress.

Your kind compliments on our Watercourt breakfast are greatly appreciated. We are thrilled that you enjoyed the variety, freshness of the fruits, and the opportunity to create your own healthy selections.

Thank you once again for your generous feedback. We look forward to welcoming you back for another unforgettable stay.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager

reviews.title: Excepcional
reviews.positives: El lugar está apartado pero hay medios que te ofrece el hotel para ir a Hue, Hoi An y al aeropuerto. Pedimos la villa delante de la playa y es espectacular. Cualquier cosa que desees se la comunicas al personal y todo son facilidades y amabilidad. El desayuno es el más variado y surtido que he visto nunca (y he viajado bastante). Puedes desayunar al estilo vietnamita o internacional. Los restaurantes son inmejorables, incluidos el japonés y asiatico del hotel Angsana, que está al lado. Ofrecen cantidad de actividades (gratis). Nosotros nos apuntamos a tiro con arco, taichi, etc. Con la habitación tienes derecho a un masaje de 60 minutos, que te deja como nuevo. Tiene un snack bar en la que te hacen los más variados cócteles, gracias a la maestria de Nam. Puedes moverte por las instalaciones con bicicleta o llamar para que te envien un boogie y te lleve a donde quieras. La playa es enorme, prácticamente no encuentras a nadie. Los dias que estuvimos estaba el mar un poco revuelto. Me recordaba a las playas de España. Especial mención a Man, que fue el encargado de que nuestra estancia alli fuera una de las mejores experiencias.
reviews.negatives: todo fue perfecto

reviews.title: great for families
reviews.text: Farther away from the other resorts but well worth it. The Banyan property is gorgeous along with the facilities that can be used with Angsana that is right next door. Great for kids who can use the kids club at Angsana and their pool,  beach and great for adults who prefer serenity and luxury at Banyan. All the rooms has their own private pool even the studio villas.  Check for weather as we had rain so couldn't use the outdoor facility but i can imagine how perfect if the weather had worked out.

reviews.title: 3 nights stay at Ocean beach front villa
reviews.text: It was a most pleasant experience as the staff service was exemplary. Location is bit off which makes the place very tranquil and out of this world. The jacuzzi was not working even after first repair but thankfully it was all sorted out. This is important as the weather was chilly and the heated jacuzzi makes all the difference. Didn't get to enjoy the pool as it was too cold. The beach was deserted too. Villa is a distance from the beach actually and the waves were strong. Thankfully the boat between Banyan and Angsana, the buggy rides and the restaurants there are excellent. We went to the Saffron restaurant twice as it was most extraordinary! The food was excellent, the staff were exceptional and the atmosphere was amazing. Definitely going back again! Really memorable dining experience! The hotel staff are all very responsive, helpful and polite. Really hospitable and they really go out of their way to make our stay unforgettable!
reviews.response:

reviews.text: The staff were all bright, polite, and kind. Recommended for those who want to avoid the hustle and bustle of the city and spend time slowly in a private space, as it is more than an hour away from Da Nang and Hue. There are no facilities nearby, such as restaurants or supermarkets, but all necessary amenities and the hotel restaurant are sufficient. Dinner at the hotel's restaurant is about 5,000 yen per person. If you want to keep costs low, you can eat for around 2,000 to 3,000 yen. The guest rooms have a luxurious feel and are very clean, allowing for a very indulgent experience. It was a hotel stay that was worth the price.

Your feedback regarding pricing and value is very helpful, and we will continue striving to offer both quality and variety to meet our guests’ expectations.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

Le buffet du petit déjeuner est exquis, et le restaurant Saffron est divin.

reviews.text: Banyan Tree was truly exceptional — the service throughout the resort was warm, attentive, and top-notch. Everything felt perfectly managed and welcoming. The only slight downside was the staff member who gave us the initial hotel tour; perhaps they were tired, but they didn’t come across as particularly friendly. Still, this was a very small issue in an otherwise flawless experience.

We apologize for the unexpected experience during the hotel tour and will address this to ensure every guest feels warmly greeted. We truly appreciate your understanding and hope to welcome you back for another flawless stay soon!

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Aufgrund unserer späten Anreise konnten wir in der Villa einen Quick Check-in machen, das hat den Prozess stark beschleunigt, sodass wir schnell zum Abendessen gehen konnten. Während unseres Aufenthalts hatte einer von uns Geburtstag und es gab sehr persönliche Aufmerksamkeiten wie einen Früchtekuchen mit Kerze & Geburtstagsständchen beim Frühstück, ein Buggy mit Geburtstagsschmuck (das Foto von uns davor erhielten wir beim Check-out sogar eingerahmt zum Mitnehmen) sowie einen Geburtstagskuchen & ein entspannendes Fußbad in der Villa. Die Atmosphäre und das Essen im Saffron waren herausragend und das Geld unbedingt wert! Auch der inkludierte Flughafentransfer überzeugte bei einer Fahrtzeit von etwa einer Stunde. Leider spielte das Wetter während unseres Aufenthaltes nicht unbedingt mit, bei Sonnenschein bietet die Villa jedoch eine grandiose Aussicht - sowohl vom Pool als auch aus der Badewanne.
reviews.negatives: Leider war das Ambiente im Frühstücksrestaurant nicht sehr angenehm. Es herrschte eine schlechte Beleuchtung sowie Einrichtung wie in einem Tagungshotel. Auch gab es leider so gut wie keine veganen (zumindest laktosefreien) Optionen, obwohl extra abgefragt wurde, ob man Allergien o.ä. hätte. Von anderen Hotels in dieser Preisklasse sind wir es gewohnt, dass es eine Vorab-Abfrage gibt, in der man angeben kann, ob es einen besonderen Grund für den Aufenthalt gibt (Geburtstag, Honeymoon etc.), welche Kissen man präferiert, ob man Allergien hat etc. Wir hatten für den Geburtstag einen Halbtagesausflug mit privatem Fahrer gebucht und konnten so die Route ganz individuell bestimmen. Der Fahrer verstand jedoch kaum Englisch, sodass wir unsere eigene Navigationsapp nutzen mussten, um ans Ziel zu komme. In der Villa waren einige Oberflächen nicht gereinigt (z.B. die Ablagefläche oberhalb des Bettes, dort sah man Staub sowie die Abdrücke abgestellter Gläser) und das Telefon im Bad fiel mitten in der Nacht mit lautem Geräusch von der Wand. Wir legten es auf den Esstisch, dort blieb es jedoch während unseres gesamten Aufenthalts liegen, anstatt wieder angebracht zu werden.

reviews.response:
Dear Abdulwahab, 

Thank you for your kind rating and for choosing to stay with us at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô!
We are delighted to know you enjoyed your experience, especially our service and facilities. Your feedback means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing stay in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Ein Traumhotel, das seinen Preis hat.
reviews.positives: Wir hatten eine wirklich wunderschöne Lagunen-Villa. Der Blick von unserem privaten Pool auf die Lagune war wirklich unbezahlbar, ganz so, als wäre man mitten im Dschungel. Es gab so gut wie keine Mücken, das Personal war unglaublich freundlich und das Frühstück sehr vielseitig und reichhaltig! Der Strand war wirklich sauber und man konnte Ewigkeiten am Wasser entlang laufen. Es gibt eine kleine Klinik auf dem wunderschönen, mit ganz tollen Pflanzen angelegten Hotelgelände, zu der man auch hin kann, wenn es einmal kleinere Probleme gibt. Unser persönliche Ansprechpartner Tuan gab sich wirklich Mühe, uns jeden Wunsch von den Lippen abzulesen. Er besorgte sogar ein Antibiotikum für meine Frau aus der Apotheke im nächsten Örtchen.
reviews.negatives: Die Speisekarte im vietnamesischen Restaurant Watercourt und dem thailändischen Restaurant Saffron war relativ überschaubar. Preislich bewegen sich beide Restaurants, und vor allem das thailändische, am oberen Ende. Leider ist das Hotel auch wirklich am A**** der Welt gelegen, so dass man nicht mal eben mit einem Grab in die benachbarte Ortschaft zum Abendessen fahren kann. Wir waren also mehr oder weniger gezwungen, im Hotel zu essen. Uns war aber von vorne herein klar, dass  ein Hotel der Banyan-Tree- Gruppe mit seinen fünf Sternen nun einmal seinen Preis hat. Es wäre nur schön gewesen, ab und zu mal lokal essen zu gehen.

reviews.title: 3rd visit
reviews.text: This time, I stayed in a beach villa, and the weather wasn't hot, so I spent a lot of time outdoors. Although the water was too cold to go into the pool, I enjoyed the warm jacuzzi a lot. When I stayed in a hill villa before, it was too hot to go out onto the terrace, but the beach villa had a garden with trees and grass, which was really nice. However, the hill villa had a dining area and a much larger living room, so I felt a bit lacking in the indoor space of the beach villa.
reviews.response:
Dear Seungmin,

Thank you for staying with us for the third time. We are glad to know that you enjoyed the Beach Villa's garden and outdoor space, especially with the pleasant weather. Though the pool was a bit chilly, it is great to hear you relaxed in the warm jacuzzi. We appreciate your feedback on the indoor space compared to the Hill Villa and hope to welcome you back again soon!

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Wunderbarer Aufenthalt, der unsere Erwartungen absolut erfüllt hat!
reviews.positives: Wunderschöne Anlage, wunderbare Natur, toller Blick aus der Oceanview Pool Villa. Sehr guter Service, insbesondere durch die "Villa-Butlerin", die nahezu rund um die Uhr ansprechbar war und alles anch unseren Wünschen arrangierte.
reviews.negatives: Das Housekeeping und der Turndown Service könnten etwas gründlicher und "liebevoller" sein, das haben wir in anderen (auch Banyan Tree-) Hotels noch etwas besser in Erinnerung.

reviews.title: Amazing Resort
reviews.text: Beautiful, relaxing and peaceful. All is perfect! The location is in a peaceful setting an hour away from Danang. Tranquility awaits!
reviews.room_type: Two Bedroom Hillside Sea View Villa with Private Pool

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ein unfassbar tolles Hotel. Die Lage, der Service, die Aussicht, die Villen-alles hervorragend.

reviews.title: Luxurious romantic hideaway
reviews.text: For a five star resort, it lives up to the billing with great services and amenities. Staff were kind and attentive. Breakfast features abundant local and international menu, with views of the beach. If you’re looking for a luxurious private retreat, then this is the perfect secluded slice of paradise. However, if you’re looking for a more authentic experience of the locale, consider booking elsewhere. While we did enjoy our lagoon villa, which is beautiful with stunning views of the mountains, the resort location is remote and somewhat cut off from the rest of the region, requiring 1-2 hour transport to visit other destinations like Hue, Danang and Hoi An. Good for honeymooners, maybe not so much for explorers.
reviews.response:
Dear Chi,

Thank you for sharing your thoughtful feedback about your recent stay at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the luxurious amenities, attentive service, and stunning views from your lagoon villa. We also appreciate your insights on the resort's remote location and its suitability for different types of travelers. Your comments will help us refine our offerings and enhance the stay experiences for our guests from around the world.

We hope to welcome you back for another relaxing stay in the near future.

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Ein Paradies für Leute, die Ruhe suchen.
reviews.positives: Absolute Ruhe. Perfekt zum Entspannen

reviews.title: Luxury
reviews.text: Very lovely hotel, staff are all attentive. Breakfast buffet is amazing.  Only downside is we went in January it was raining. Pool was too cold and spa was freezing as well. Location is far I would recommend to bring your own cup noodles and food or you will only be able to pay for room service or eat at the restaurant which is quite pricy. Overall still recommend the place during a warm day.
reviews.response:
Dear Kenny,
 
Thank you for choosing to stay with us at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô and spending time sharing your feedback here. Although many areas of your stay were enjoyable but we are sorry to learn that the weather during your stay was unfortunately not as expected, which definitely affected to the overall atmosphere. It is with your reviews that we can continue to evaluate our services and will work with our Executive Chef to review food price and quality to make  your next stay become more pleasurable. 

Thank you again and we would love to welcome you back soon.

Best regards, 

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager
reviews.room_type: Two Bedroom Hillside Sea View Villa with Private Pool

reviews.title: Wie im Paradies!

Best regards, 

Franck Rodriguez 
Area General Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Alles war einfach wunderbar. Das Personal ist so aufmerksam und die Anlange ist einfach traumhaft
reviews.negatives: Der Pool war bisschen zu kalt

reviews.title: Relaxing stay

reviews.title: Wunderbarer Ort - kleines Paradies
reviews.positives:
Nach einer längeren Fahrt aus Hué, gab es ein sehr freundliches Willkommen. Alles perfekt vorbereitet und organisiert. Wir hatten eine der Villen am Hang gebucht mit wunderschönem Blick auf das Meer und die Berge.

Während des gesamten Aufenthaltes hat sich Yen exzellent um alle Anliegen und Wünsche gekümmert. Immer erreichbar und sehr angenehm im Kontakt👍👍👍😎.

Das Frühstücksbüffet war mit Abstand eines der besten, welches wir genießen durften. Sehr abwechslungsreich und immer frisch. Es bleiben keine Wünsche offen, ob asiatische Gerichte oder Klassiker der Frühstückskultur. Auch hier ein tolles Team. My, Y, Yen, Kieun und NGO waren immer präsent, super freundlich👍👍. Tolles Team.

Das Spa war ebenfalls sehr stilvoll und professionell.

Das ganze Team der Buggy Fahrer, war immer gelassen, humorvoll und sehr schnell da.

Auch in der Bar blieb kein Wunsch offen. DAT und die anderen Bar Mixer haben uns exzellent Cocktails gemacht.

Insgesamt sehr, sehr empfehlenswert.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Need a Seaview room rather than Hill + Sea view for most unobstructed view of the ocean.

Go early for breakfast as it can get crowded. Limited food options within the compound and not easy to travel out. 
Main swimming pool is extremely small.
Staff was helpful and courteous.
reviews.response:
Dear Kah,

Thank you very much for staying at Banyan Tree Lang Co and your candid review of the things that made you feel uncomfortable during the stay.

We truly appreciate that you brought these feedbacks to our attention, these gives us an opportunity to re-look at our high maintained standards, to ensure consistency and great services to all our valued guests, at all times

Once again, we thank for your kind rating and look forward to welcoming you back to Banyan Tree Lang Co in the future for another memorable stay. 

Best Wishes,

Glen Cook
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Vietnam at its best

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wie im Paradies - alle unsere Wünsche wurden erfüllt. Wir hatten eine wunderschöne große Villa mit schattiger Terrasse und eigenem Pool, völlige Ruhe und Abgeschiedenheit,  trotzdem viele Möglichkeiten zu Aktivitäten,  und das Essen war sensationell.

Christmas holiday was still the raining season in central Vietnam. Stormy weather when we were there. This resort would be a lovely choice during dry season.

And if you are a golfer, there’s a Golf course adjacent to the property. Although it was raining almost entirely the time we were there, the resort is charming and the staff helpful and attentive.

reviews.title: Oase der Ruhe und Entspannung

Wir können diese Hotel uneingeschränkt empfehlen.

reviews.text: We got a very good time

reviews.title: Ein Paradies zum entspannen und verwöhnen lassen
reviews.positives: Eine Oase zum Wohlfühlen . Abseits gelegen mit einem langen sauberen Strand. Unsere persönliche Managerin Mi war genial.

reviews.positives: Staff really will try their best to response to your request, they provided good service anytime anywhere, it's just awesome. Nice comfort environment, spacious room with nice decor.

reviews.text: One of the best hotel stay i have.  Staff were not just simply friendly as in other hotel, they are super friendly and helpful. Their attention to details and my needs were something I highly appreciated.  Highly recommended, perfect in every way.
reviews.positives: Friendly/Helpful, Environment, Ambience

reviews.title: Perfekter Aufenthalt
reviews.positives: Dieses Hotel zählt für mich zu den Top 5 weltweit, in denen ich je übernachtet habe. Der Service ist herausragend – aufmerksam, zuvorkommend und in jeder Hinsicht darauf bedacht, dem Gast jeden Wunsch von den Augen abzulesen.
reviews.negatives: Das Saffron Restaurant ist meiner Meinung nach ein wenig überteuert.

reviews.text:
Enjoyed our stay very much
Privacy in Villa was interrupted 3 times
Food in restaurants average & similar in all restaurants

reviews.title: Traumhotel mit höchstem Standard
reviews.positives:
Alles! Das Hotel ist ein absoluter Traum.Das Personal liest einem jeden Wunsch von den Lippen ab.
Speziell unser Villa Host “Man“ war ganz  toll und überraschte uns täglich mit vielen Aufmerksamkeiten. Er war die Herzlichkeit in Person.
Auch „Quynn“ im. Rest. Saffron verwöhnte uns sehr. Das ist Dienstleistung auf höchstem Niveau!

reviews.title: A true Banyan Tree experience
reviews.text: Amazing hotel complex and grounds, though a good 2 hours from Da Nang airport.  Excellent staff. Go for a villa on the hill to really appreciate the terrain. On-site restaurant is a culinary retreat. Our only small complaint is the prices on the wine list; the ordinary wines we had in Hoi An were priced with a 6- or 7-time markup.  Interestingly enough, all other liquor and room service were reasonably priced.
reviews.response:
Dear Vassilios,

Thank you very much for sharing your feedback following your stay at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô.

We are delighted to know that you enjoyed the overall experiences and the attentive service from our team. Your kind comments are truly appreciated. At the same time, thank you for sharing your observation regarding the wine pricing. Your feedback is very valuable to us, and we will certainly share it with our team for review.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Einer der schönsten Flecken Erde
reviews.positives: Die Lage in der Natur

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: While we stayed at both the InterContinental and Banyan Tree, the latter truly set a new bar for service. Photos don't do the hotel's design justice—it might look simple on screen, but the sheer grandeur of the property in person is breathtaking. More importantly, the service quality at Banyan Tree was profoundly impressive; they have a way of making you feel truly cared for.
reviews.response:
Dear S,

Thank you very much for sharing your wonderful experience with us. We are truly honored to know that Banyan Tree Lăng Cô stood out during your stay and left such a strong impression, both in design and service.

We are delighted that the grandeur of our resort and the heartfelt care from our team made your stay memorable. Your kind words are a great encouragement to our colleagues, who are dedicated to creating meaningful and personalized experiences for every guest.

It was our pleasure to welcome you, and we sincerely look forward to hosting you again for another exceptional stay.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: The best place to be!
reviews.positives: Einfach alles - es ist das mit Beste Hotel in dem wir je waren! Alles ist einfach perfekt - der Service, der Strand, das Essen! EInfach top!! DANKE

reviews.title: A very good relaxation time.
reviews.text: It was a location that I found to rest without going anywhere, so the location was not an issue, but if you are a traveler considering external sightseeing, you may need to think about the distance to the city. It was a relaxing vacation in a quiet place, and there was nothing lacking in the meals at the internal restaurant. The internal activities were modest but enjoyable to participate in. The friendly service from the villa manager is also one of the reasons I want to visit this place again. I think I'll go back soon. ^^
reviews.response:
Dear 성은,

Thank you for sharing you wonderful review on your recent stay at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô!

We are pleased to hear that our peaceful location was perfect for a relaxing getaway, and that you enjoyed the dining, activities, and overall atmosphere. Your special mention of the villa manager’s warm and attentive service truly means a lot to us and will be shared with the team.

We look forward to welcoming you back again very soon.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Luxuriöses und ruhiges Resort erfüllt alle Ansprüche
reviews.positives: Die Villa 123 mit Lagunensicht war überragend. Ausstattung, Pool und Lage sind sehr gut. Insgesamt haben alle Villen einen hohen Standard und erfüllen alle Anforderungen. Insbesondere das Bett war großzügig, man konnte aus einer Vielzahl an Kissen auswählen. Hervorzuheben ist die exzellente Betreuung durch einen persönlichen Ansprechpartner. Bei uns waren das Mr. MAN und Mrs. TUYEN. Stets standen sie bei allen Fragen und Anliegen sogar per WhatsApp zur Verfügung.

reviews.title: Quite good however it’s a bit inconvenient
reviews.text:
We had great experiences at this hotel, especially Villa, food and facilities are amazing!
However 2 things if I have to say the one is too far from the city so We can’t use Grab from the hotel, delivery too. Second is hotel staff are amazing but maybe that is their manual to ask about our feedback frequently.
One time is okay, they did ask us every order for food, something like that.
reviews.response:
Dear Kenta,

Thank you very much for sharing your feedback and for highlighting your great experiences, we are truly delighted to hear that you enjoyed these aspects of your stay.

We also appreciate your constructive comments regarding our location and service approach. As our resort is situated in a more secluded area surrounded by nature, ride-hailing and delivery services can indeed be limited, however, our team is always happy to assist with transportation arrangements or dining needs to ensure convenience for our guests.

Regarding the frequency of feedback requests, we sincerely apologize if this felt excessive during your stay. Our team’s intention is always to ensure your comfort and satisfaction, and your input helps us refine our service balance moving forward.

Once again, thank you for sharing your thoughts. We truly value your understanding and hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another relaxing stay in the near future.

With warm regards,

Franck Rodrigu

reviews.response:

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the privacy and peaceful atmosphere of your villa, as well as the warm hospitality from our team. It was a pleasure having you with us, and we hope to welcome you back for another relaxing stay in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Absolutes top Hotel mit absolutem top Service. So etwas hatte ich bisher noch nicht. Nicht günstig, aber das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis ist okay. Die Strandvilla ist sehr zu empfehlen. Mega Frühstück.
reviews.negatives: Unmöglich etwas zu finden, was einem dort nicht gefällt...

reviews.title: Amazing stay!!!
reviews.text:
We stayed 2 nights at Banyan Tree and we thoroughly enjoyed our time there for our babymoon. The staff were super welcoming from the moment we got there till when we left. All requests/queries were taken care of by our guest host Bich, who was nothing short of amazing and she was very attentive.

We will definitely come back.
reviews.response:
Dear Hoi,

Thank you so much for choosing Banyan Tree Lăng Cô to celebrate such a special occasion as your babymoon.

We are thrilled to know that you had a thoroughly enjoyable stay with us. It is wonderful to hear that our team made you feel so welcomed from the moment you arrived until your departure. A special thank you for recognizing Bích, she will be so happy to know her attentiveness and care made a lasting impression.

We look forward to welcoming you back, perhaps next time with your little one!

Wishing you all the best on your journey ahead.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Oase der Ruhe mit exzellentem Service
reviews.positives:
Das Personal war unglaublich freundlich und zuvorkommend! Besonders Bich, die guest Managerin hat sich sehr gut um uns gekümmert.
Die Ausstattung und die Annehmlichkeiten des Hotels sind aussergewöhnlich und alles ist sehr stimmig und durchdacht.

reviews.title: Perfect place for our anniversary
reviews.text:
We looked for a more secluded, quiet place to celebrate our anniversary. Our stay exceeded our expectation. The personal touches and services were the highlights. The host made sure we were happy with anything the villa and facilities had to offer. He even decorated nicely the villa for our anniversary. What an effort! Resort manager also came to greet us personally at breakfast. All staffs were friendly and helpful. 

The villa was clean and looks like new. Well decorated with all amenities I could think of. The only negative note is the villa next door had a noisy kid, but the noise didn't last long. Sound proof of the villa was excellent. 

Saffron restaurant was good in food and service. Breakfast was one of the best I have ever had in terms of varieties and nutrition values.
reviews.response:
Dear Norman,

Thank you for celebrating your anniversary with us at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô. We are delighted to hear your stay exceeded expectations and that the personal touches, villa decoration, and attentive service made it truly special. Besides, we also take well note your feedback regarding the brief noise disturbance for further improvement and we are glad it did not affect your stay.

Once again, it was our pleasure to have you with us and we hope to welcome you back for another memorable visit soon!

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Ein exklusives Resort mit sehr freundlichen und zuvorkommenden Personal.
reviews.positives: Ein außergewöhnliches exklusives Frühstück und dazu ein Engel Windy , sie hat uns auch bei Regentagen den Urlaub so angenehm wie möglich bereitet.

reviews.title: It's really so good..
reviews.text: There are many free programs inside, and the staff's kindness is truly top-notch ㅠㅠㅠ I definitely want to bring my parents next time. The service satisfaction is extremely high from start to finish! The food is a bit disappointing, but everything else makes up for it.
reviews.response:
Dear Kam,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share a kind and thoughtful review of your stay at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô. We are looking forward to welcoming your parents and you back to have more seamless experiences in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Das BESTE was wir in Vietnam erleben durften
reviews.positives:
Das BESTE was wir während unserer Reise nach Vietnam erleben durften.
Unsere Pool-Villa, das Personal, das Frühstück, die Sauberkeit - einfach nur Klasse !
reviews.negatives: Wenn überhaupt es etwas zu verbessern gäbe, dann die Kaffeemaschine auf dem Zimmer. Nur ein Wasserkocher (mit allerdings hochwertigen Teesorten) ist nach meiner Ansicht heute nicht mehr Zeitgemäß. Das ist aber wirklich nur nebensächlich und eher eine Anregung für unseren nächsten Aufenthalt :=)!

reviews.title: Amazing place!
reviews.text: Perfect place for vacation! Saffron restaurant deserves Michelin star :-)

reviews.title: Es lohnt sich hier eine Pause einzulegen, wenn man dem geschäftigen Treiben und den Scharen von Touristen der Städte ent
reviews.positives: Lückenlos nach der Ankunft wird das Einchecken bereits in der gebuchten Villa vorgenommen. Für sämtliche Aktivitäten und Buchungen steht ein persönlicher Ansprechpartner zur Verfügung und kümmert sich um den reibungslosen Ablauf. Der Ausblick vom privaten Pool der Lagoon Villen und das sehr komfortable Bett laden dazu ein den gesamten Tag hier zu verbringen. Sollte man sich doch für eine Aktivität entscheiden, dann ist eine morgendliche Yoga Stunde im Pavillon mit Blick auf den Garten und die Lagune auch sehr zu empfehlen.

reviews.title: Uitstekend
reviews.positives:
Wij hadden een Lagoon villa. Lag prima, comfortabel en lekker rustig. Vanwege het weer was het prive zwembadje wel een beetje koud, maar het is prive genoeg om je zwembroek niet nodig te hebben. Kamer en badkamer zijn riant en worden tweemaal daags schoongemaakt en de handdoeken aangevuld. Er zijn drie restaurants om gebruik van te maken. Een (Safron) ligt op een heuvel en bedient een wat luxer segment. Gewoon een keer doen.
Ook het ontbijt is erg uitgebreid en lekker. Je kunt een gratis fiets krijgen om over het complex te fietsen of bellen voor een Buggy als je je wilt verplaatsen
Wat erg fijn was is de persoonlijke aandacht. Bij het inchecken kregen wij een jongedame toegewezen, die ons  begeleide in onze wensen op het gebied van reserveringen en transport van A naar B regelde. 
Ngoc (Jade)  kwam iedere morgen bij het ontbijt vragen wat we vandaag in de planning hadden en kwam zelf ook met voorstellen. Vervolgens regelde ze dat dan. Erg fijn om zo ontzorgt te worden. Ze was ook via Whatsapp direct bereikbaar.
reviews.negatives:
De accommodatie ligt in een heel mooi gebied, maar daardoor wel afgelegen. Je kunt niet naar een dorpje fietsen. Wij zijn 's avond wel in het grootste dorp aan de lagoon wezen eten, maar dat is zo'n 20 km van de accommodatie verwijderd.
Kortom je bent aangewezen op de Banyan Treea en het zusterhotel ernaast.

reviews.title: 自然の中の優雅なリゾートホテル
reviews.positives: 自然が豊かで人里離れた所でしたが楽しくて3日間の時間はすぐに過ぎてしまいました。今回はのんびりしたくてホテルのみで過ごしました。空港にも迎えにきてくださって助かりました。ホテルのアクティビティが充実していて外に出なくても割となんでもできますし散策するだけでも時間が過ぎます。芝にはリスがいたり見たことのない鳥がいたり歩くだけで楽しかったです。シーズン終盤に行ったので波が高くて海に入れなかったのが残念ですがビーチでも散策したりマウンテンバギー（アクティビティ）で海岸を走ったり満喫しました。早朝に日の出も見に行きました、とても綺麗です。レストランはどこも美味しかったですがなんと言っても朝食が豪華。珍しいフエ料理もあって幾つか食べることができました。移動はカートもありますが自転車を借りることもできます、子供用の自転車もありました。ビラに宿泊しましたが庭でBBQを注文できます。量が多くて美味しかったのに残してしまって申し訳なかったです。2人用でしたが女性なら3人分くらいありましたので満足できると思います。アフタヌーンティーも頼みました、量より質という感じでお菓子もですがお茶がとても品があって美味しかったです。全て予約制で慣れれば簡単で色々と選べていいです。とにかく全てがホテル内で完結できるのでゆっくりしたい方や長居したい方には最適な場所です。

reviews.title: Fantastic Stay
reviews.text:
It was all we could have asked for except that we wished there would be some type of real authentic local Vietnamese foods some where near the resort since we had limited time in Hue and it was important to me to taste every local foods I could find.  

The breakfast was to die for.  I could not say enough about the fruits and vegetables as well as all types of juices, dairy and deli.  It was organic and all meat was lean and delicious prepared, cooked just about right.  

Within the resort where it surrounded by the natural beauty- ocean and mountains and, each villa comes with small ponds, and around it, there were songs sang by frags and ducks next to our pool which made us feel as much close to nature as we could never had...  

Biking was another activities we enjoyed...It was lovely for people who come from a big metropolitan city where biking was not as easy as most towns or less traffic places.  What a wonderful way to browse the beauty of the resort.

Also the free shuttle to Hue, Hoi An is a plus for any traveller to base in Lang Co. Overall, it was a very pleasant trip for both of us. Facilities are new and the breakfast with free flow champagne makes it a real value stay. Definitely recommend Banyan Tree to anyone who wants to make this a memorable experience.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay during a strong typhoon
reviews.text:
Unluckily, we stay in a great ocean view pool villa during a crazy typhoon. It keeps raining on our arrival, day trip to Hue and facing a typhoon on the day we plan to enjoy the villa and facilities in the hotel.
However, our villa host - Nina and most of the staffs make us a wonderful stay in Banyan Tree. They are all very initial to serve you, concerns your needs and problem solving immediately.
Such as the concierge remind us Saffron, their signature restaurant will be closed on Wed and Thu, so we can catch our first try on our arrival nights, the only night we can dine there. Housekeeping found the toilet not flush well and contact technician team to fix immediately, turn down service and small gifts from Nina are surprising us everyday, really consider of our needs which a fruit platter and bubble bath are ready after our day trip to Hue.
We have a great and unforgettable stay with the only sunshine farewell us on our leaving...

reviews.positives: Villaen var lækker. Dog var vandtrykket meget lavt indenfor. God morgenmad. Dejlig strand. God rengøring
reviews.negatives: Havde en meget ubehagelig episode med en ansat på cocktail baren, der havde et attitude problem. Jeg sagde at jeg havde brug for 2 minutter mere til at kigge på menuen før jeg bestille. Han kom tilbage og modtog bestillingen uden at kigge på os og virkede flabet. Da han kom tilbage med drikkevarerne kiggede han mig direkte i øjnene og sagde at jeg virkede meget ulykkelig i dag, og om jeg havde et problem.  Ret voldsom episode man ikke ville forvente af et resort af den standard. Da vi klagede over oplevelsen var folk gode til at undskylde, men det var en lidt nærig kompensation at vi kun fik refundereret vores 2 happy hour drinks, når hele vores aften blev ødelagt. Det havde været på sin plads at refunderer os for en hel overnatning, da denne episode ikke må ske, når man betaler så mange penge. Så forventer man også en vis standard. Har aldrig oplevet en så dårlig service oplevelse før og vi har efterhånden været en del forskellige steder.

reviews.title: A paradise on earth, a sanctuary for the senses
reviews.text: A most pleasurable experience, a paradise on earth. Great golf at the adjacent Banyan Tree Langco Golf Course. A well designed integrated resort with comfortable and private villas, great food, quirky bars, and a well equipped gym. The staff went out of their to ensure a superlative customer experience, anticipating your needs and ensuring all your creature comforts are met. The view of the sea next to the villas is breathtaking and the room is designed to maximize the enjoyment and relaxation of the guests. The entire experience was seamless and superlative. The facilities for recreation and dining are world class as is the attention of all staff. Will be back!
reviews.positives: Very relaxing landscaped grounds, comfortable and spacious villas, attentive and caring staff

reviews.title: Not the luxury experience we expected
reviews.positives:
- Very good communication with the hotel before our arrival, despite several last-minute flight changes.
- We received a warm and kind welcome upon arrival, despite it being 2 a.m.
- The hotel’s location is beautiful, by the beach, surrounded by greenery and a peaceful canal – very relaxing atmosphere.
- The 1-bedroom villa was very spacious, with two toilets and a large bathroom featuring a bathtub with an ocean view.
- Excellent internet connection throughout the property.
- The buggy service was very responsive – quick to arrive whenever we called.
- The breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of options.
- A truly wonderful chef who went above and beyond to accommodate our tastes – she made a delicious lava cake, thank you!
- The Vietnamese cooking class on the boat along the small canal was a great experience – lots of fun and great food.
- Room service was quick and efficient.
- Restaurant staff were very friendly and welcoming.
- The massages were outstanding – even the complimentary 60-minute massage was perfect. The therapists took into account the areas to avoid and the preferred pressure.
- The small gift delivered each evening was a thoughtful and much-appreciated touch.
- The hotel manager was attentive and genuinely listened to guest feedback.
reviews.negatives:
- No introduction or tour of the villa was provided at check-in.
- We only learned three days after our arrival that we had a dedicated butler - when we met her at breakfast !
- Communication with our butler was confusing and unprofessional – a surprise birthday moment was ruined due to a lack of discretion and poor coordination.
- Staff overall lacked the training expected from a high-end hotel.
- No effort was made to manage food allergies, despite having informed the staff in advance. One guest allergic to corn was served corn on the first night. Another, intolerant to seafood, was served fish chips. And coriander was served at nearly every meal, despite us stating clearly that we couldn’t eat it.
- Activities offered by the hotel were unorganized and felt rushed or improvised.
- The outdoor area of the villa was completely neglected, which diminished the beauty of the place (see photo of the villa entrance).
- The villa was in need of renovation – damaged wallpaper and outdated decor.
- Housekeeping in the villa was sloppy – not only were there fingerprints on glass surfaces, but also smudges and marks in more intimate areas, clearly left by previous guests.
- Cleaning was not done while we were at breakfast unless we specifically called to request it. Otherwise, staff showed up while we were in the villa.
- The beach was not very attractive, though it was relatively clean.

reviews.title: Wonderful stay
reviews.text: We had high expectations going into our stay and Banyan Tree Lang Co matched or exceeded all of these. Excellent amenities in a stunning resort - it is as the pictures show. Service was impeccable from every staff member we encountered, from management who'd go out of their way to ask about our stay and for feedback, and grounds staff who'd always have a smile and greeting "xin chao" to offer. As some have noted, the location is remote, but we found this to be a lovely base for day excursions out to explore the different cities of Central Vietnam - and of course there are many activities, relaxation and dining options within Banyan Tree and the adjoining Angsana Lang Co property. We'd strongly recommended Banyan Tree Lang Co and look forward to staying again!
reviews.response:
Dear Emily,

Thank you very much for sharing such a wonderful review.

We are truly delighted to know that Banyan Tree Lăng Cô met and exceeded your expectations. Your kind words about the genuine warmth of our team are deeply appreciated, especially your recognition of the care shown by both our management and grounds staff.

We are pleased that you enjoyed our tranquil location as a base to explore Central Vietnam, as well as the diverse activities, relaxation, and dining options within Banyan Tree and Angsana Lăng Cô. Thank you for your strong recommendation, and we very much look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay.

Warm regards,

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.room_type: One Bedroom Hillside Sea View Villa with Private Pool

reviews.title: A beautiful stay
reviews.positives:
We stayed in a lagoon villa, and it was beautiful. The bed was huge and comfy, the shower really nice and the huge soaking bathtub was perfect after a long day. The staff were great and all really friendly, and the complex itself is in a beautiful setting - it's only small so easy to walk around and the grounds are perfectly maintained. 
The hotel offers day trips in the area, and our guide (Hung) who took us to Hue, was absolutely brilliant. It was one of our favourite days of our entire month in South East Asia (even in the rain!).
Quality of food in Saffron was incredible.
reviews.negatives:
We stayed during the typhoon, so weren't able to use our pool or outdoor area, so would have loved some seating in the villa itself (but this isn't the hotel's fault, obviously).
Whilst there are three dining options, the menus are a bit limited. We stayed for 6 nights and by the end were running out of new things to try.

reviews.title: Amazing Stay
reviews.text:
An absolute oasis of a resort with outstanding service and the most attentive staff. Our Lagoon Villa was very private, luxurious and had fantastic amenities. The resort has many activities that we took advantage of  like snorkelling and kayaking. The quality of food was great and the cocktails that we tried in both the bar and restaurant were delicious .

Coming for Hoi an it was an adjustment to not be able to leave the resort as freely to explore, however with the purpose of our visit, which was to relax and slow down - Banyan Tree was a perfect choice.  

Small, thoughtful touches throughout our stay really made it extra special. Would highly recommend visiting.
reviews.response:
Dear Olivia,

Thank you for your kind words and for sharing your wonderful experience at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô. We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the villa itself, hotel activities, delicious food, and cocktails. While we understand the difference in pace coming from Hội An, and we are glad that our resort offered the perfect setting for relaxation and slowing down. Our team takes great pride in making each stay special, so it is wonderful to know they were successful in gaining your impression.

Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another peaceful and memorable stay.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: I was concerned about the aging facilities since it was built a long time ago, but as expected from a Banyan Tree, they were well-maintained. The staff were all sweet and friendly.
reviews.negatives: The electric kettle, hairdryer, and hand soap were partially missing, and beach towels were not replaced after housekeeping. Housekeeping seemed to need some attention.

reviews.title: Best vacation resort
reviews.text: If you're looking for a villa retreat, this is the best. You can swim in your room while enjoying views of the sea and coast with cloud-covered mountains, a scenery that can only be found in places like Bali, Phuket, and Koh Samui. It has its own unique characteristics that are wonderful. There are various free activities within the resort (such as motorboat rides and canal boats), and the restaurant is excellent. The room conditions are good, well-maintained despite their age. The staff is friendly, and the butlers, including assisting with reservations, provided great support within the resort, making for a fantastic experience. There were two butlers assigned to us, but only one name is recorded. Phung (Jennie) was incredibly helpful, making our trip a truly enjoyable one. Thank you.
reviews.response:

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a thoughtful and detailed review of your stay with us.

We are truly delighted to hear that you had a memorable stay with a strong impression with Banyan Tree Lăng Cô. We will make sure your compliments are shared with her and the entire team, they will be very encouraged to know they contributed to your enjoyable stay.

Thank you once again for choosing to stay with us. We sincerely hope to welcome you back for another unforgettable holiday in the near future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: Happy Baby Moon~
reviews.text: I went on a prenatal trip to Vietnam, which is said to be hot in June. The accommodation was about an hour away from downtown Da Nang, but they helped with vehicle reservations from the place, and we arrived safely at the resort. The accommodation was as nice as shown in the pictures. The bedding was clean and tidy. I brought a filtered shower head, but the water was so clean that the filter didn't change color during our two-night stay. The massages at the resort were suitable for pregnant women and relieved my fatigue. And the breakfast was really delicious!! I had such a pleasant time during our two-night stay. Next time, I want to visit again with my baby.
reviews.response:

Thank you so much for sharing your beautiful experience with us. We are truly honored that you chose to spend such a special prenatal trip at our resort.

It brings us great joy to know that you felt well cared for from the moment you arrived, and that our team was able to assist you comfortably with your journey from Da Nang. Your kind words mean a lot to us, and we are so touched by your plans to return with your baby. We would be absolutely thrilled to welcome your growing family back and help create even more memorable moments.

Wishing you all the best for a smooth and joyful journey ahead!

Warmest regards,

Franck Rodriguez

reviews.text: This is probably my favorite hotel/resort during my entire Da Nang trip! Though it’s tucked away in Lang Co, I love how secluded and private it is, without the noisy crowd. The villa and the view were so nice that I literally stayed there for 3 days without even leaving the resort. Also, the service is just impeccable. Every staff member is so sweet yet professional. I am going to remember every genuine smile from them all. I would also like to thank the host Mi, and the others from the driver, tour guide, to everyone else at Banyan Tree Lang Co for such an amazing experience. I hope to come back one day!

reviews.text: The stay here was exceptional. My husband and I truly enjoyed every minute of it. The staff took care of us really well and most of them seems to know that it is our wedding anniversary! Our flight was delayed by 15mins and the free shuttle waited for us. Our concierge, Tuan, made sure that our day is planned out and bounce us some ideas. There was daily hi-tea sent to our room, and the water court restaurant even served us an anniversary dessert before our departure. It made our stay so special. And our lagoon villa was very private with a pool. Highly recommend to stay here.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
The villa was fabulous: private, quiet, beautifully equipped to the highest standard. 
All the staff were absolutely excellent, in every capacity. Our hostess, Tuyen, could not have been more delightful and helpful. 
When we had difficulty with the air con in the villa, it was sorted out effortlessly. We appreciated the manager's gesture of a bottle of wine.
The breakfast buffet was absolutely excellent.
All hotel facilities were superb.
reviews.negatives: The only thing we felt was that the restaurant prices were excessive. We would also have welcomed a purely Vietnamese restaurant, serving local and national specialities, at reasonable prices. For example freshly caught local fish barbecued on the beach.

reviews.title: Outstanding staff.
reviews.text: Well, for us who travel a lot sooner or later you’re going to have a bad day. Got a severe gastrointestinal issue upon arrival not of their fault. Could not have selected a better facility to get sick. Staff very concerned about my wellbeing brought me a doctor to see me. Later on they took me to the nearby clinic for IV fluids which helped a lot. Then after they brought me chicken soup when I was at a point that could start eating. Told my wife that it felt like my deceased mother was here! It’s beyond words the appreciation I have for their staff!
reviews.response:

Thank you for sharing your experience. We are sorry to hear you weren’t feeling well but glad our team could provide the care and comfort you needed. Your kind words truly mean a lot—we will be sure to share them with our staff. Wishing you safe and healthy travels ahead!

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

reviews.title: A heavenly retreat if the aim is to stay put and relax totally.
reviews.positives: The suite in this luxury hotel is lavishly furnished and beautifully fragranced.  Our unit looked over a lagoon and provided a sense of complete privacy and tranquility.  The buffet breakfast included was delicious, offering a comprehensive selection of both western and eastern dishes.  There was great attention to details and our villa host - Mi, was most passionate about the ethos of the hotel.  A surprise belated birthday cake - both in the form of edible cake and decorative tower made from cloth, awaited on return from our dinner on our last night.  Thank you.
reviews.negatives: We were excited about the yoga lessons provided for guests but found we missed the only one session during our stay....  Lunch was limited to one restaurant which served ok western food, although the room service menu was offered (and we found out on the last day that snacks were served at the bar).  The location of the hotel was remote, such that once checked in, we felt confined within it which made it slightly stifling after having explored more widely in other locations.

reviews.title: Amazing hotel
reviews.text: We chose Banyan Tree as one of our honeymoon destinations, and our experience with this hotel was special even before our stay. Due to a family matter, we had to change our travel timeline at the last minute, but the hotel was incredibly supportive. This kindness meant so much to us during such a difficult time. The hotel itself is unbelievably beautiful, and the restaurant was exquisite. We will forever cherish our experience and hope to return someday to stay even longer.

reviews.title: Memory stay and exceptional service
reviews.text:
Banyan Tree Lang Co truly exceeded our expectations! From the moment we arrived, the staff went above and beyond to ensure our comfort and satisfaction. Their service is warm, attentive, and thoughtful.

One of the highlights of our stay was the complimentary upgrade to a 2 bedroom villa. And we had chance to attend a warm Christmas tree lighting ceremony. It was a wonderful surprise that made our trip even more special.
The villa was spacious, beautifully designed, and offered breathtaking views—a perfect mix of luxury and tranquility.

The resort itself is impeccably maintained, with lush surroundings, pristine beaches, and a peaceful atmosphere. The dining experience was excellent, especially Saffron restaurant, offering a delicious Thai food.

Overall, Banyan Tree Lang Co is a place where exceptional service and thoughtful touches create unforgettable memories. Highly recommended, and we can’t wait to return!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It is a little over an hour from Da Nang Airport, so it's not really recommended for those who want to focus on sightseeing in the city or Hoi An; however, I think it’s the perfect place for those who want to relax and escape the hustle and bustle. It is a very quiet and beautiful resort full of nature. A butler is assigned, and you can contact them via LINE if you need anything. My return flight was at midnight, but they even provided a bit of service for my accommodation until departure from the hotel. I tried various foods, including Thai cuisine and steak, and everything was very delicious. You can freely use the facilities of the adjacent hotel chain, and they also take you there by buggy. Despite being a resort of this level, there is a unique sense of value that comes from Vietnam. I highly recommend it.

reviews.title: the best choice for luxurious relaxation!
reviews.text: Quality, quality, and quality. If you are looking for a relaxing resort, this could be your best choice! It's 70 minutes from the airport, but this could be better if you are seeking a calm and peaceful resort for your partner or family. Every villa has its own advantages, even if it is the cheapest lagoon villa. You can see a forest and swimming geese right in front of you with more privacy. (You know what I mean!) The private pool size is perfect! And if you need more amenities to enjoy, just choose the beachfront villa. The ocean is right in front of you, and it has slightly better amenities including soft-closing toilet lids and more light switches, etc. The size of the room itself is the same. So just follow your preferences! It’s a very good decision to choose a lagoon villa if you are looking for special deals. It has top-quality restaurants! The Water Court Restaurant is the best location, but if you want to taste top-class Thai cuisine, Saffron Restaurant is superb! The best Thai food I’ve ever had in my life. Every villa has its own manager, and you can personally communicate with them anytime you want via WhatsApp or KakaoTalk. Buggies are right in front of you if you need to go anywhere! The spa is also very nice! I fell asleep while getting a treatment! It sometimes gives you a 20 to 30% discount, so you should ask your villa manager about that! Activities are also varied! You can find almost every water sport including jet ski riding. We had the best time on our vacation! Hope you can enjoy this resort as well! The employees are super kind and super supportive! You can count on them! Thank you, Banyan Tree! I will visit you again!
reviews.response:

Thank you for taking the time to write us this wonderful review. At Banyan Tree Lăng Cô, we always endeavor for guest satisfaction and I am glad to hear that were successful in achieving this with you. We thank you from the bottom of our hearts and wish to see you soon.

Best regards, 

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager

reviews.title: Perfect stay at Banyan Tree
reviews.positives:
The stay at Banyan Tree was absolutely perfect. It is a true quite break in a nature area with an impeccable service. 

The hotel is very nice, proposes many activities (craft activities, sport activities, cultural activities). We chose to do the cooking class with Y, which was one of the best activities we did in Vietnam. 

The breakfast is incredible, with many different options of Vietnamese food and western food. 

The bungalow offers a full privacy in the middle of the nature, and is very pleasant. 

The Saffron restaurant offers a variety of Vietnamese dishes in a tasting menu that is worth the try. Thanks Tram for the impeccable service and the experience. 

The staff is very thoughtful and pays a lot of attention to details and to you. They are nice and welcoming, thanks especially to Tuan who made sure our stay was the best and who was very available.

reviews.title: Extraordinary stay and value for money
reviews.positives: A true 5 star experience. The service level on 5 star hotels in Vietnam are, from our experience the last 3 weeks, very good. But Banyan is extraordinary. I mean in every single part of your interaction with the crew on this resort. Dont remember all the names, but we got a very nice, careful and personal follow up from Tuan, and I got an excellent massage from Chi at the spa. We were there with a 6 month old baby for 4 nights. We really got the most out of our stay. We joined activities like yoga, HIIT and table tennis. We used the 24/7 gym with cooled towels. We took several spa treatments, tried all restaurants including in villa dining, baby sitting service and more. Everything was great. Even the italian food at Azura was at a quality level way beyond what I would expect to get at Vietnamese resort. All in all it felt like we got an extreme amount of value, and would very much recommend this place to anyone.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.positives: Staff, food, standard of rooms/design

reviews.title: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ AN EXPERIENCE BEYOND ALL EXPECTATION — Banyan Tree, Vietnam
reviews.positives:
Where does one even begin when a stay has moved you so profoundly? From the very first moment at Banyan Tree Vietnam, we knew we were somewhere entirely extraordinary — a place where hospitality isn't a service, it's an art form, practised with grace and genuine warmth by every single member of the team.

TUAN — Our Butler was fantastic. He organised our day trip to Hue with care and thoughtfulness . When we returned, tired from a full day of discovery, he had already arranged a wonderfully soothing foot bath waiting for us at the villa! He checked in on us everyday to see if we needed anything and arranged an afternoon tea delivery to the villa on a rainy day. All our needs were immediately seen to by Tuan.

NGAN — Experience Manager
When we found ourselves feeling a little under the weather mid-stay, Ngan stepped in with the quiet, reassuring presence of someone who truly cared. She checked on us regularly and sent up a beautiful pot of ginger tea with honey — the most warming, thoughtful remedy. But it was another moment that truly floored us: when I mentioned I couldn't find my size in a pair of trousers I had fallen completely in love with at their gallery, she didn't hesitate — she contacted the supplier directly to try to source them. That level of dedication is simply unmatched in anywhere else we’ve stayed worldwide.

TAY — Dinner Host & Culinary Guide
Dinner with Tay was a highlight of our entire trip. With such infectious enthusiasm and deep knowledge, she guided us through the stories and traditions behind each dish — turning a meal into a genuine cultural journey. Her passion for Vietnamese cuisine made every bite more meaningful, and we left the table not just satisfied, but genuinely enriched.

DAO — Hotel Manager
And then there is Dao! What a remarkable woman!

reviews.title: Amazing, staff just a bit OTT
reviews.text:
We stayed in a beach villa, which, despite the poor weather, was fantastic. The heated jacuzzi allowed us to enjoy the outdoor space, and the room itself was extremely comfortable. Again because of th pe weather our acitvities were limited, but the hotel made every effort to keep us entertained, with bad weather activities complimentary, and day trips to Hoi An and Hue possible. The resort is half way between Hue and Da Nang, which means there is not much to do in the local vicinity, but this could be a good point if your aim is to relax in peace. We ate in all the restaurants and bars available and found them all to be excellent. 

The staff were incredibly attentive, and it's a shame the they are the cause of our only complaint. That is, they were just a bit too attentive. Our welcome to the room was over half an hour long, when we'd just arrive after a long car journey. Our activities felt as though they were supervised by the staff. We were interrupted in the middle of our own private conversations over dinner or drinks on multiple occasions for mundane information or just idle chat. We feel bad for leaving this in a review when everybody was so nice, but felt it was worth mentioning. 

Overall, we had a fantastic time, and look forward to coming back someday when the weather is better.
reviews.positives: Rooms, beach location, facilities

reviews.title: The best hotel and staff of any hotel we have ever stayed in, a special shout out to Tuan, who was a superb host and ‘fi

reviews.negatives: Nothing, everything was excellent

reviews.title: Truly Magical
reviews.text:
From the moment you step out of your car, the experience already feels different. Instead of a typical hotel check-in counter, you are whisked away by buggy straight to your villa, where your host personally welcomes you, handles the check-in, and gives you a tour of the property.

From the elegant décor and thoughtful design to the private pool overlooking the coastline and mountains, every detail felt magical and unforgettable.

What truly stood out was the service. The staff didn’t just greet guests politely—they made the effort to remember your names and greet you personally throughout the stay, which made everything feel warm and genuine. Every request for activities, dining reservations, or arrangements was seamlessly handled through your personal host via WhatsApp, making the entire stay effortless and convenient.

Although the spa package was on the pricier side, it was truly in a class of its own. Walking into your own private spa villa instantly made it feel like an exclusive and luxurious retreat.

Overall, it was worth every penny and truly lived up to the standards of a Michelin 2-star hotel—an exceptional stay that blended luxury, privacy, and heartfelt hospitality perfectly.

Your feedback is incredibly encouraging for all of us, and we are honored to have delivered an experience worthy of such high praise.

We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another exceptional stay.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.
